evidence: GrammarConfigLoader.validateNoLegacyKeys() actively rejects any config containing 'copulas' key with a clear error message directing users to the current API; no silent coexistence of old pattern
RelationConfig.getFullPattern() Javadoc notes 'Canonical field name is pattern; cql_pattern is no longer supported' — the migration is complete and enforced, not silently tolerated
CqlUtils.java Javadoc contains duplicate word 'Both Both' — minor doc artifact from edit, not a migration issue
No @Deprecated annotations anywhere in the production codebase
No TODO/FIXME comments referencing 'migrate', 'legacy', 'old api', or 'remove after' found across all seed files
RelationUtils.RELATION_ALIASES provides forward-compatible alias resolution — this is an intentional backward-compat shim for short API param names, not stale migration debris
All 30 production files use a single consistent Java/BlackLab API; no mixed paradigms (e.g., no old Lucene API alongside new BlackLab API)
buildBcqlWithLemmaSubstitution throws IllegalArgumentException for unrecognized patterns rather than silently falling back, preventing zombie usage of old formats
incomplete_migration.issues_preventing_higher_score: Minor Javadoc typo in CqlUtils ('Both Both') is the only residual artifact; no structural migration debt exists. Score held below 95 due to this doc inconsistency and a single informal comment style artifact.

strengths: GrammarConfigLoader actively validates and rejects deprecated config keys at startup — migration is enforced, not just documented
No @Deprecated symbols exist that are still called by active code
The BCQL/CQL pattern API is clean and unified: no old-style and new-style patterns coexisting
RelationUtils.RELATION_ALIASES is clearly labeled as an intentional compatibility layer with explicit forward-looking documentation
Single JVM language (Java), single dependency ecosystem — no mixed-language migration concerns
incomplete_migration.issue_character: The codebase has no active migration technical debt; any historical migration (e.g., copulas → embedded CQL, cql_pattern → pattern) has been completed and the old paths actively guarded against.
incomplete_migration.score_rationale: The codebase scores very high on this dimension. There are no deprecated-but-called symbols, no stale migration TODOs, and no old+new API coexistence. The only marks against a perfect score are a minor Javadoc typo ('Both Both' in CqlUtils) and a single informal comment noting a prior format, which read together suggest recent but completed housekeeping rather than in-flight migration. Relative to a global anchor where 80 = minor isolated artifacts and 95 = completely clean, this codebase falls in the 88 range.

issues.summary: CqlUtils Javadoc contains duplicate word 'Both Both' — artifact of an incomplete edit
evidence: Class-level Javadoc reads: 'Both Both {@link pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.api.SketchHandlers} and ...' — the word 'Both' appears twice on consecutive lines, indicating a cut-paste edit artifact
issues.suggestion: Remove the duplicate 'Both' word from the CqlUtils class Javadoc. Change 'Both\nBoth {@link ...}' to 'Both {@link ...}'.

root_causes: Historical migration from 'copulas' config key and 'cql_pattern' field to the current unified pattern API appears complete and well-guarded
possible_false_positives: RelationUtils.RELATION_ALIASES might superficially appear to be a stale compatibility shim, but it is intentionally maintained for API usability and is well-documented
